PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES STATUS CONFERENCE NOTICE

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF STATUS CONFERENCE (CHILD SUPPORT) ON APR-07-2020 CONTINUED TO CHILD SUPPORT SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR ON MAY-12-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 416 - ON COURT'S OWN MOTION, DUE TO THE COVID-19 EPIDEMIC, MATTER IS CONTINUED. THIS CONTINUANCE IS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE 68115 AND THE EMERGENCY ORDER OF THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF THE CALIFORNIA SUPREME COURT DATED MARCH 16, 2020. COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER ALL ISSUES PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT.
